questions.text: What is the key benefit of LoRA's parameterization structure during model serving?
options: The adapter weights can be pre-merged with the base weights, yielding zero additional inference latency.
It makes the model immune to quantization loss.
questions.correct_answer: The adapter weights can be pre-merged with the base weights, yielding zero additional inference latency.
questions.explanation: Because the update is linear, W_merged = W0 + (alpha/r)*B*A can be pre-computed, eliminating runtime overhead.
